checks.name: agent_registry_list
checks.description: List all 6 canonical agents with stratum and status
checks.detail: 6 agents listed: PAYLOAD_RESOLUTION(B), PERSONA_DISPATCH(B), EMERGENCE_ENGINE(B), ZONE_TRACKER(B), PIPELINE_EXECUTION(A), SQO_GOVERNANCE(D)

checks.name: agent_registry_info
checks.description: Agent detail retrieval with full spec
checks.detail: PIPELINE_EXECUTION: Stratum A, mutation_authority=[structural_artifacts, chronicle_events], provides=[pipeline_state, structural_topology]

checks.name: agent_interaction_illegal_stratum
checks.detail: PERSONA_DISPATCH→PIPELINE_EXECUTION (B→A) — INVALID, stratum B→A is illegal per constitution

checks.name: agent_registry_init
checks.detail: Registry initialized with 6 canonical agents, persisted to agent_registry.json

checks.name: adaptive_enrichment_blueedge
checks.detail: 84 suggestions: 15 DEBT_PERSISTENCE, 69 UNENRICHED_CANDIDATES — correct for PATH B specimen with partial enrichment

checks.name: adaptive_enrichment_netbox
checks.detail: 26 suggestions: 3 CONFIDENCE_GAP, 7 DEBT_PERSISTENCE, 16 UNENRICHED_CANDIDATES — confidence gaps detected after P1 enrichment

checks.name: adaptive_enrichment_approval
checks.description: Suggestion approval workflow with operator identity

checks.name: convergence_maturity_levels
checks.description: Three maturity levels correctly defined with specimen thresholds
checks.detail: DESCRIPTIVE(2+), EMERGENT(3+), ESTABLISHED(5+) — all with evidence requirements

checks.name: convergence_promotion_threshold
checks.description: Maturity promotion rejected below specimen threshold
checks.detail: DESCRIPTIVE→EMERGENT rejected with 2 specimens (requires 3+). Accepted with 3.

checks.name: convergence_ai_block
checks.description: AI actor correctly blocked from maturity promotion
checks.detail: ai_system rejected as operator for promotion — governance boundary enforced

checks.name: convergence_demotion
checks.detail: EMERGENT→DESCRIPTIVE demotion with full maturity log trail (3 entries)

checks.name: learning_pipeline_domains
checks.description: 5 capability domains defined with parameterizable targets
checks.detail: EVIDENCE_INTAKE, SEMANTIC_DERIVATION, ENRICHMENT, GOVERNANCE, PROJECTION — each with parameterizable fields

checks.name: learning_pipeline_classification
checks.description: CONSUMABLE events correctly classified to capability domains
checks.detail: 4 CONSUMABLE events → 4 proposals: INTAKE(LOGIC_EXTENSION), SEMANTIC(PARAM), GOVERNANCE(PARAM), ENRICHMENT(MODULE_CREATION)

checks.name: learning_pipeline_filtering
checks.detail: PROPOSED event correctly excluded — only CONSUMABLE/CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE/MODULE_CANDIDATE eligible

checks.name: learning_pipeline_real_scan
checks.description: Real specimen scan with operational learning events
checks.detail: NetBox: 14 events, 0 consumable (all in earlier lifecycle states) — correct: events need operator governance to reach CONSUMABLE

checks.name: learning_pipeline_cross_specimen
checks.description: Cross-specimen scan discovers all learning event sources
checks.detail: scan-all found 1 specimen with learning events in governance/ subdirectory (NetBox). Other paths not in governance/ subdirectory.

checks.name: python_39_compatibility
checks.description: All P4 scripts compatible with Python 3.9.6
checks.detail: from __future__ import annotations used in all P4 scripts
